texto: Tis true, Dr. Buzzard, that a silver bullet must be of the largest and heaviest sort to travel with any amount o’ range or accuracy. But after yon hellhound took no notice o’ my challenge or my first discharge, I said what was fitting with lead buckshot well-washed with silver that I’ve got from the most particular little shop in Birmingham. It didn’t like it.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Rob S. Rice: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a lideranca. O trecho “Tis true, Dr. Buzzard, that a silver bullet must be of the largest and heaviest sort to travel wi…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que lideranca, guns, monsters pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de viagem e monsters.

texto: An oath is a frightening thing when you are prepared to keep it, and I felt it tightening around my soul even as I gave my pledge.
explicacao: Citação de Rob S. Rice sobre temas ligados a fe. “An oath is a frightening thing when you are prepared to keep it, and I felt it tightening around …” articula fe, faith, honor em registro de fe, com relevância para contextos como honor e oath.
